bio: Leads product strategy at Linear, the project management tool for software teams.
Co-founded GitHub and grew it to the world's largest code hosting platform before acquisition by Microsoft.
Engineering manager at Dropbox focused on developer platform and API integrations.
Oversees engineering at Notion, the all-in-one workspace used by millions of teams worldwide.
Drives growth and expansion at Loom, the async video messaging platform now part of Atlassian.
Co-founded PostHog, the open-source product analytics platform. Previously worked at Y Combinator.
Leads enterprise sales at Retool, the platform for building internal tools used by 100k+ companies.
Co-founded Pika, the AI video generation startup that raised $55M Series A.
Heads marketing at Attio, the next-generation CRM built for modern data-driven sales teams.
Product lead at Descript, the AI-powered audio and video editing platform backed by Andreessen Horowitz.
